decision: RE-SCOPED after parallel PR #810 (vault-key-coherence) merged+released mid-build: #810 owns the SecretStore/MasterKeyManager layer (per-agent accounts master-key:<stateDir>, v2 keyId header, dual-key fallback, convergence-on-write). Landing my parallel MasterKeyManager scheme (master-key-<scope>) would have created a SECOND per-agent account convention on the same machines — a new bifurcation. Dropped: SecretStore.ts rewrite, secret-store-key-resolution.test.ts, ConversationStore time-bomb fix (landed as #809), ratchet annotations (main back at baseline). Kept (verified unfixed on main): Config.ts loud-merge+placeholder boot guard (PR #802 explicitly deferred this layer to this spec), GlobalSecretStore generation guard, SecretManager reporting, SecretMigrator forceFileKey drop.
evidence: main ccee75efe: Config.ts merge catch still empty at ~line 668; #810 files list excludes Config/GlobalSecretStore/SecretManager/SecretMigrator; no-silent-fallbacks passes on clean main; 47/47 targeted tests green post-rework.

decision: Tier-1 lite: new read-only dev command instar dev:claim-check — pre-build advisory listing open + recently-merged PRs touching intended paths + specs matching keywords. Earned from the 2026-06-05 double parallel-session collision (#802 vs keychain spec; #810 vs #808). Live smoke retroactively detects the exact #810 collision. Advisory default; --strict exits 1 on overlap or unverifiable claim space.
evidence: 10/10 unit tests; tsc clean; live smoke output shows [MERGED] #810 src/core/SecretStore.ts
